title: Janitzio Island Lookout
description: Accessible by boat, this island offers stunning views of Lake Pátzcuaro and the surrounding mountains. While the island is known for its cultural landmarks, the lookout itself provides a peaceful space to admire the lake’s beauty and local fishing traditions

title: Santa Clara del Cobre Workshops
description: Just outside Pátzcuaro, this artisan town specializes in handcrafted copper goods. Visit open workshops to see artisans hammer, mold, and polish copper into stunning cookware, jewelry, and decorative pieces — a living tradition passed down for generations.

title: Erongarícuaro Lakeside Trail
description: A quiet walking path along the lake’s edge, surrounded by trees, birdsong, and local flora. It’s a perfect spot for nature lovers, photographers, and anyone seeking a calm, reflective experience near the water
